function.name: get_lunch_menus
function.description: Fetch today's lunch menus from Helsinki-area restaurants (Compass, Factory, Luncher, Oikeus networks). Call this whenever the user asks what's for lunch, wants today's menu, or asks about nearby restaurant options.

restaurant.description: Optional: partial name of a specific restaurant to filter results (e.g. 'Roihu', 'Factory', 'Dylan'). Omit to get all restaurants.

format.description: Output format. 'pretty' for human-readable text, 'json' for raw structured data.
